item.title: Blog
item.description: Sharpen your defenses with the latest threat insights, industry trends and product updates sure to put you one step ahead of hackers – and your competition.

item.title: 10 Ways to Identify a Social Engineering Attack
item.description: Discover 10 ways to spot a social engineering attack and protect your business. Learn how to identify threats and prevent breaches caused by human error.

item.title: Rust-Based Ransomware is Advancing on MSPs
item.description: Discover how Rust-based ransomware is evolving to target MSPs and SMBs. Learn why this threat is growing and how to protect your business from costly attacks.

item.title: SOC Insights: Lumma Stealer and DarkGate Malware spanning over 772 incidents
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber's SOC tackled 722 incidents, stopping threats like Lumma Stealer & DarkGate malware. Learn key mitigations to bolster your cybersecurity.

item.title: Scheduled Tasks, AnyDesk, and VPN Compromise
item.description: Explore key insights from Blackpoint Cyber’s SOC on threats using scheduled tasks, AnyDesk, and VPN compromise, plus actionable mitigations to protect your business.

item.title: Trojan Malware, Powershell Attacks, and Credential-Stealing
item.description: Blackpoint’s SOC responded to 703 incidents in a week. Learn how to mitigate Trojan malware, PowerShell attacks, and credential-stealing threats.

item.title: Identity is the Foundation of Today's Cyber Attacks
item.description: Identity is the key to modern cybersecurity, enabling faster, precise responses and protecting businesses against evolving threats in the cloud and beyond.

item.title: A Spooktacular Wrap-Up of SOCtober
item.description: A Spooktacular Wrap-Up of SOCtober

item.title: Blackpoint Tackles TeamViewer and AnyDesk Threats in Government and Industrial Incidents
item.description: Blackpoint Tackles TeamViewer and AnyDesk Threats in Government and Industrial Incidents

item.title: Identity Security & Total Threat Defense with Blackpoint and Cisco Duo
item.description: Identity is the key to modern cybersecurity, and that is why Cisco Duo and Blackpoint Cyber are joining forces for total threat defense.

item.title: Blackpoint Cyber Achieves Microsoft MISA SMB Verified Status
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber achieves Microsoft MISA SMB Verified status, delivering 24/7 SOC protection and visibility for MSPs and SMBs using Microsoft solutions.

item.title: Gootloader Incident Analysis: Blackpoint SOC's Response Across Industries
item.description: Gootloader Incident Analysis: Blackpoint SOC's Response Across Industries

item.title: Outsmart Hackers and Keep Your Holidays Merry with These Cybersecurity Tips
item.description: Outsmart Hackers and Keep Your Holidays Merry with These Cybersecurity Tips

item.title: Malware-as-a-Service Threats Drive Over 500 Incidents Blocked This Week
item.description: Malware-as-a-Service Threats Drive Over 500 Incidents Blocked This Week

item.title: 2024 SOC Year in Review: Key Cyber Threat Trends and Mitigations
item.description: 2024 SOC Year in Review: Key Cyber Threat Trends and Mitigations

item.title: Top 4 Ways to Secure Microsoft 365 Vulnerabilities
item.description: Be proactive with your cybersecurity as you move to Microsoft 365. Blackpoint Cyber shares the top four ways to secure potential vulnerabilities.

item.title: What Would a Data Breach Cost You?
item.description: Knowing the costs your company could incur from a breach is an important step in deciding how much to invest in your cyber security standing.

item.title: A Note from the CEO on True Managed Detection and Response (MDR)
item.description: Jon Murchison, CEO and Founder of Blackpoint Cyber, writes about what it means to offer true Managed Detection and Response (MDR) services.

item.title: Blackpoint Managed Detection and Response, Built for MSP Security
item.description: MSP security is not what it should be; how many times must MSPs succumb to advanced hacker tradecraft before they seek out an effective security solution?

item.title: The Confusing Cyber Security Landscape
item.description: The cyber security landscape can be difficult to navigate, so here are some tips on how to verify that your cyber security solution will be effective.

item.title: CISA Warns of Nation-State Attacks – Are You Prepared?
item.description: Nation-state hacks on MSPs are increasing, according to The Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA)'s recent report

item.title: 12 Cyber Security Principles from the Experts
item.description: Blackpoint Cyber reveals 12 cyber security principles that drive their solution and business. Read this weeks post to learn more!

item.title: Spear Phishing Campaign Stopped by Blackpoint MDR
item.description: An in-depth look at a spear-phishing attack on one of our Managed Detection and Response (MDR) Clients. Learn how our SOC analysts discovered this attack.

item.title: Blackpoint Cyber Opens New 24/7 MDR Service
item.description: Traditional outsourced SIEM-as-a-service is no longer enough. Read more about why Blackpoint decided to offer its own MDR service to customers.

item.title: Olympic Destroyer Hack: How We Would’ve Stopped It
item.description: See step by step how our SNAP-Defense platform would've stopped the Olympic Destroyer Hack before causing damage. Read More!

item.title: Bank Data Breach Insurance: Here’s Why It Isn’t Enough
item.description: Data breach insurance is no longer enough for financial institutions to be targeted by cybercriminals. Learn how to protect sensitive customer data.

item.title: The Infamous Friday The 13th Virus: A History Lesson
item.description: Celebrating the "unluckiest day of the year" with a little story about Jerusalem; the Friday the 13th virus, an old virus that completed its mission.

item.title: Industrial Networks Are Vulnerable To Cyber Attacks
item.description: Industrial Networks Are Vulnerable To Cyber Attacks

item.title: Unwrap the Fun This Holiday Season with Blackpoint!
item.description: It's that time of year for holiday cheer! Blackpoint has some exciting opportunities to brighten your days & fill your stockings with some tech goodies.

item.title: How to Evaluate & Invest in a SOC Service
item.description: Looking to invest in a SOC? Blackpoint breaks down the ins and outs of what a Security Operations Center is and how it fits into your growing cybersecurity strategy.
